prompt_text:
### Demographics: 55-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Recurrent nocturnal hypoglycemia (2-4 episodes/month, self-resolved) over the last 3 months.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~6.2 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Glimepiride 4mg once daily; Insulin Glargine 18units once daily; Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 71.8 kg; Height 156.3 cm; BMI 29.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 147/71 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.3%; 9 months ago 7.0%; 6 months ago 7.2%; 3 months ago 6.7%; current 6.8%), FPG (12 months ago 151mg/dL; 9 months ago 151mg/dL; 6 months ago 152mg/dL; 3 months ago 143mg/dL; current 134mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 72.1kg; 9 months ago 70.2kg; 6 months ago 71.7kg; 3 months ago 68.8kg; current 71.8kg), Height (12 months ago 156.3cm; 9 months ago 156.3cm; 6 months ago 156.3cm; 3 months ago 156.3cm; current 156.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 28.0kg/m²; current 29.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 141mmHg; 9 months ago 143mmHg; 6 months ago 145mmHg; 3 months ago 144mmHg; current 147mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 73mmHg; 9 months ago 71mmHg; 6 months ago 74mmHg; 3 months ago 75mmHg; current 71mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 71U/L; 9 months ago 79U/L; 6 months ago 71U/L; 3 months ago 69U/L; current 73U/L), AST (12 months ago 92U/L; 9 months ago 84U/L; 6 months ago 90U/L; 3 months ago 92U/L; current 86U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.3mg/dL; current 1.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 20mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 20mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; current 19mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 139mg/g; 9 months ago 131mg/g; 6 months ago 166mg/g; 3 months ago 127mg/g; current 152mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 87mg/dL; 9 months ago 83mg/dL; 6 months ago 88mg/dL; 3 months ago 84mg/dL; current 86mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 47mg/dL; 9 months ago 49mg/dL; 6 months ago 50mg/dL; 3 months ago 50mg/dL; current 48mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 178mg/dL; 9 months ago 156mg/dL; 6 months ago 160mg/dL; 3 months ago 161mg/dL; current 168mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
